title: Module 3 knowledge check
markdown: Quick check on how learning patterns work on Lextures.

questions.prompt: What is the main purpose of spaced practice?
choices: Strengthen long-term memory through timed review

questions.prompt: Adaptive paths generally suggest activities based on what?
choices: Your recent performance and mastery estimates

questions.prompt: Diagnostic assessments are best thought of as:
choices: A map of gaps to guide study
